nodes.label: AI as accessible expert for troubleshooting and information gathering
nodes.grounding_span: I consulted AI to understand how to design an ASO. Traditionally, I need to consult expert in this field but I have limited access to them.

nodes.label: AI reliability in providing verifiable sources
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination and lack of source transparency
nodes.grounding_span: AI can help me and can provide sources that can back up its reasoning.

nodes.label: AI capability in handling long nucleic acid sequences
nodes.label_negative: AI hallucination with long DNA/RNA sequences
nodes.grounding_span: AI tool is bad at analysing long nucleic acid sequence. It hallucinates a lot when long DNA or RNA sequence is involved.

nodes.label: AI as autonomous NGS data analysis tool
nodes.label_negative: Dependence on bioinformatician for NGS analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I wish it could help me analyse NGS sequencing dataset like this: I upload the fastq raw data to the model and ask it to do read mapping, data analysis and it will do that.

nodes.label: Research efficiency and autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: it's really time consuming and requires much effort in communication. I wish AI can help me analyse these datasets.

nodes.label: Epistemic trust and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I looked up the method sections and verified myself.

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for troubleshooting and information
nodes.grounding_span: I mainly used AI tools to troubleshoot experimental problems. And I also used AI to help me gather information on past research.

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI for long sequence analysis
nodes.grounding_span: AI tool is bad at analysing long nucleic acid sequence. It hallucinates a lot when long DNA or RNA sequence is involved.

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for AI in NGS analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I wish it could help me analyse NGS sequencing dataset like this

nodes.label: Verification-oriented reasoning — cross-checking AI outputs with primary sources
nodes.grounding_span: I asked AI to show where did it get the rules it presented using real papers. I looked up the method sections and verified myself.

nodes.label: Pragmatic domain-specific calibration — using AI where it works, avoiding where it fails
nodes.grounding_span: AI tool is bad at analysing long nucleic acid sequence. It hallucinates a lot when long DNA or RNA sequence is involved.
